feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud CBC Organizational Structure Default Company Code and Cloud Warehouse
entry.content:
Dear All

We are configuring Organizational Structure within CBC but while confirming the organizational structure, system is prompting to confirm the Default Company Code for each country and Cloud Warehouse relation to a storage location.

Kindly confirm what is the objective and impact of assigning the default company code and linking a Cloud Warehouse to storage location. Please also explain the purpose of Cloud Warehouse as we dont have any such requirement neither implementing EWM but its mandatory to create organizational structure.

entry.title: Send mail notification if PO output fail
entry.content:
We need to send Email notification if Purchase Order output fails.

The user is also looking for the reason mentioned in email for which the PO output has failed.

entry.title: Not able to add custom Field in the Cutover templet
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 


We are not able to add a custom field in the pricing condition migration template. Could you kindly suggest how this can be done?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration of PO with third-party item. How to reference to purchase requisition in migration file?
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,
we have an issue while migration a PO with a third-party item.
After migrating the PO and posting GR, the sales order can't be billed because the GR isn't recognized in the sales order.
In my opinion the reason seems to be that the reference to the purchase requisition is missing in the migrated PO-position.
Unfortunately the migration file has no field to enter the purchase requisition.

How can we solve this in S4 Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can I backup the S/4 Sap public edition system to an external device?
Payment APIs availability in S4 Hana Public Cloud to send the payment files to the Bank
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In our current implementation, we need the payment files (available under the Manage Payment Media app) in S/4 Hana Public Cloud to extract and send to the Bank (SFTP is what we are planning).

The Bank is located in France and the client is from the EU region.

We plan to use the BTP Integration Suite to do this. We are looking for the standard APIs to extract the files from the S/4 Hana PC that are available under the Manage Payment Media app.

We found an ODATA API (Payment Advice) that is used for supplier/customer payment advice but this is not useful as this is for Customers/suppliers.

We couldn't find the API service in standard and I need a way to do this integration between S/4 Hana PC and Banks leveraging the BTP Integration Suite.

Appreciate any pointers here and if this kind of integration was already done by anyone the steps of the process will be helpful for us.

Please let us know if there are any standard APIs or ways of extracting the files into the CPI from the S/4 Hana PC so we can integrate with the Banks or SFTP of the Banks.

If not APIs is there any other way that I can get these files sent over to the iFlows in Integration Suite to place them in the SFTP or send to the Banks automatically?

This is crucial and very important for the client implementation to go live.

Thank you,

Hanu

entry.title: Free text in automatic payment (F110)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Public Community,

Our requirement is to insert a free text, during the creation of an automatic payment through Manage Automatic Payment app (F110 tcode), that will be reported in the correspondente accounting document generated in SAP as header/item text (NOT in the correspondente DME file).

From my knowledge this is not possible by standard and this is the reason of my question. Have you any possible idea for this?

Best Regards

entry.title: Missing tax number categories of business partner for few countries
entry.content:
How to add missing tax number categories of business partner ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When there is a data change in Product master, can we get an e-mail alert in S/4 public cloud?
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am looking for an option in S/4 Public Cloud to get an alert notification when there is a data change in the product master. At the moment I don't see any option in the system so looking for opinions.

Regards,

Rajeev

entry.title: How to Test Extensaibility in TDD System?
entry.content:
Hallo,

we are setting up Public Cloud TDD system.
This is stand allone system without any transport to real test system.
Both tenants are separated.
Does it mean that DEV tenent is totaly separated from CUST (so the changes in DEV do not influance DEV) and the extensability (on stack & side by side) must be tested in DEV tenant? (with its own scopes, org. structure & master data)?

Best regards
Tomasz

entry.title: Issue in ABAP CDS Views - SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

I have created a Data definition with Sales Order and Sales Order Item fields and when I see the output I am getting as below.

But My requirement is to get data as below. 

I require order items grouped with order no. 

Kindly Help.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.content:
How to configure automatic email with multiple CCs.

entry.title: Process the DCD for released sales orders.
entry.content:
Remove the blocked sales order which is already released from the documented credit decision list.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: UPDATE PAN ON VENDOR MASTER DATA
entry.content:
We are using API to create business partner 'API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner' in the role of supplier fin-accounting . 

The field J_1IPANNO is not available on the API. 

As the integration is flowing online , how can we update this field in the supplier vendor master data on the tab Supplier : country -specific enhancement 

is there any badi, enhancement for public cloud ? 

Thanks 

Ana

entry.title: [R] not possible to upload migration templates via migration cockpit app
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I tried to upload the migration template via migration cockpit app in the sap test system and then i get error message "A system maintenance event is in process. Please try again later. " please check attached screenshot(systemerror)

 

Could you please tell us what's the reason and downtime? when should we have access to upload the file again?

 

Currently we are in the cutover phase and we have to upload the templates to test system first in order to proceed with productive system later.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Authorization for Define Characteristics Groups and Define Class Groups in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Please let us know which catalog or app id should be used to edit the  Define Characteristics Groups and Define Class Groups.

We get an error with "You do not have authorization to change the data" when trying to edit 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Manage Product Master Data component scrap (MARC-KAUSF) is not available.
entry.content:
Hello,

 

In F1602 component scrap (MARC-KAUSF) is not available.

 

If I enter a value in material by using MM02 I cannot see it or manage it in F1602.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Create billing documents from sales orders, not delivery orders
entry.content:
Dear all.

How can I create billing documents from sales orders, not delivery orders in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition ?

Kind Regards.

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: When will Standard API - API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV be Deleted
entry.content:
We are using API - API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV.

We are aware this will be discontinued in the future. Is there a timeline on when exactly this API will be discontinued?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
